A '''battle''' took place at [[Ord Radama/Legends|Ord Radama]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was one of the first engagements of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]].

{{Battle-stub}}
